summary: All 18 proposals pass the filter-DSL parseability check (zero fall-through conditions — a clean improvement over the R1 50% silent-skip rate); main mathematical concerns are sample-starvation on the triple-conditioned entry archetypes (~5 of 18 likely <30 triggers/30d) and scale-ambiguity on funding/basis_rate fields that the Devil flagged.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First exit kernel combining funding sign-flip with OI decay; orthogonal to all 5 live exit kernels (fixed/time_only/breakeven/trail/multi_tp) which are price/time-based.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: As exit kernel applied across positions (~5000 universe per combo) × ~50% funding<=0 × ~10% oi_change_pct<=-2 co-occurrence ≈ 250 firings per typical entry pipeline
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Pairs naturally with breakeven (lock at funding flip) and trail (tighten on OI decay); least useful with time_only.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First exit using top_trader_position_ratio_dec flag; structurally orthogonal to the 5 price/time exit kernels.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: Flag token _dec ≈ p25 regime → ~25% of position lifetimes fire this exit
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Best with breakeven and trail; weak with multi_tp (would short-circuit ladder).

analyses.distinctness_notes: First premium-aware breakeven kernel; orthogonal to time/price-based BE.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: premium_bps in [-5,+5] is the modal range for liquid perps → very high firing rate; degeneracy risk
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Breakeven family only; likely degenerate (Devil flag valid) — recommend tightening band to [-2,+2] bps before deep eval.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First basis-convergence exit; orthogonal to existing exit kernels.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: Scale-dependent: if decimal (±1%) → ~80% always-on (degenerate); if interpreted as bps → ~50% activation
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Quick/time_only exit family; scale ambiguity on basis_rate must be resolved at data-loader level before scoring is meaningful.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First volume-conditioned trail kernel; existing trails use static ATR multiplier.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: volume_pct_below_p25 by construction fires on ~25% of position lifetimes
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Trail family only; cleanest pairing with X-series acceleration/decay variants.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First order-flow-based exit; structurally distinct from price/time stops.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: taker_buy_ratio_5m<=0.45 fires roughly 30% of long-position bars
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Long-only; pair with breakeven for protection, avoid trail (Devil flag: early-exits during pullbacks).

analyses.distinctness_notes: First session-conditioned exit parameter selector; novel dimension among 126 existing exits.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: hour_utc>=14 → ~42% of clock; session=US conjunction ≈ 30% of total positions
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Acts as parameter modulator; recommend bounding hour_utc<22 (Devil flag valid) and binding explicit TP/SL multipliers before scoring.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First sentiment-state-based short exit; orthogonal to price kernels.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Short-only; Devil flag valid — semantics are static-state not transition. Without _extreme→_high transition support, kernel is wrong-sided. Flag for synthesizer to either reframe as 'while crowd long, hold' or augment with transition logic.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Triple orthogonal: OI surge + funding extreme + premium discount; existing OI/long archetypes use 1-2 of these conditions, not all 3 jointly.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: 1400 OI_Price events × 0.25 (oi>=15%) × 0.20 (funding<=-0.04 if interpreted as 4bp; ~1% if -4%) × 0.25 (premium<=-15bps) ≈ 18; Devil scale-ambiguity flag valid
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Squeeze setup → multi_tp ladder optimal; small sample but high-conviction — synthesizer may still keep for diversity even though stats power is weak.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First contrarian top_trader short on pricechange channel; combines crowdedness flag + event-type + volume gate.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Fade exhaustion → fixed or breakeven preferred; trail likely whipsaws during chop.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First basis-rate-driven short on OI_Price; uses curvature dimension under-exploited in registry.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: 1400 OI_Price × 0.05 (basis>=0.05 — narrow under either scale) × 0.10 (premium_extreme) × 0.40 (oi>=10%) ≈ 3-15; Devil correlation flag valid (premium and basis correlate)
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Mean-reversion short → fixed/breakeven; basis_rate scale must be resolved before this is computable in practice.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Listing-age conditioning is rare in registry; combines with funding_abs_extreme + liquidity gate for fresh-token niche.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Devil flag valid — funding_abs_extreme is unsigned and direction-agnostic; recommend synthesizer add explicit funding<=-X for long-side semantic safety.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Existing R6 long archetypes use small-cap/low-liq filters; global_short_ratio_extreme as sentiment gate is novel for this channel.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Squeeze fuel → multi_tp ladder; sample is thin but R6/long is empirically alive (E316-E327 lift +0.343), so even small-sample addition has option value.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First joint session × marketcap × volume filter in 121 existing filters.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Universal filter; pairs with all 5 exit families.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Three-way liq × funding × listing-age filter not in registry.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Low-liquidity universe — Devil's slippage flag is critical; recommend mandatory paper-shadow with realistic fills before any combo using this filter is promoted.

analyses.distinctness_notes: First risk archetype using move_pct + day_change_pct as hard gate (existing risk archetypes use sizing scalars).
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: CRITICAL — Devil flag valid: move_pct<=3 EXCLUDES Reserved6 (8-15%/180s by definition) by construction. Synthesizer must either scope channel to OI_Price/pricechange OR relax to move_pct<=8/day_change<=20 before composing with R6 entries.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Existing cross_channels use sequential timing; synchronous (<30s) co-fire with taker-flow gate is structurally new at the parseable-fields level.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: 1400 OI_Price × 0.40 (oi>=10) × 0.50 (pump events) × 0.40 (taker>=0.55) ≈ 112; note synchronous-30s constraint not parseable, archetype matches single-channel conditions only
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Cross-channel timing in notes is descriptive; parser only enforces the 3 listed conditions. Synthesizer should be aware effective archetype is single-channel oi+pump+taker, not cross-confirmed.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Joint conditioning of OI threshold + low_liq + sentiment lean is novel for R6/short pipeline.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Cross-channel sequencing not parser-enforced (same caveat as #17). Devil's tautology flag valid — verify OI→R6 gap >5s in historical alerts. Low-liq short slippage modeling mandatory before promotion.
